variables.notes: No depreciation/amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the operating-section excerpt. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected COGS row(s), and nothing should be added separately.

No depreciation/amortisation row related to SG&A/admin/R&D appears in the operating-section excerpt. With no explicit same-level D&A line above financial items, D&A is assumed embedded in the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket, so nothing should be added separately.
